inputs.label: Total Employees
inputs.businessContext: Total number of full-time equivalent employees in the organization.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of full-time equivalent employees in the organization.

inputs.label: Absenteeism Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of scheduled work hours lost due to unplanned absences (ISO 30400).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of scheduled work hours lost due to unplanned absences (ISO 30400).

inputs.label: Average Hourly Wage (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average hourly wage including benefits and payroll taxes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average hourly wage including benefits and payroll taxes.

inputs.label: Average Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Standard scheduled hours per employee per day.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard scheduled hours per employee per day.

inputs.label: Working Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of scheduled working days per year (excluding weekends and holidays).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of scheduled working days per year (excluding weekends and holidays).

inputs.label: Replacement Cost per Hour (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of overtime, temporary staff, or cross-training to cover absent employees.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost of overtime, temporary staff, or cross-training to cover absent employees.

inputs.label: Overhead Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to account for indirect costs (supervision, facilities, HR) per direct labor hour.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to account for indirect costs (supervision, facilities, HR) per direct labor hour.

inputs.label: Industry Type
inputs.businessContext: Industry sector for benchmarking and adjusting cost factors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Industry sector for benchmarking and adjusting cost factors.

inputs.label: Include Overtime Penalty
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies a 1.5x multiplier to replacement costs for overtime hours.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies a 1.5x multiplier to replacement costs for overtime hours.

rules.message: Absenteeism rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Average hourly wage must be greater than zero.
Total employees must be at least 1.
Replacement cost per hour cannot be negative.
Overhead multiplier must be between 1 and 5.
Manufacturing industry typically includes overtime penalty; verify if applicable.

thresholds.message: Absenteeism rate exceeds 5% – consider root cause analysis (Lean Six Sigma).
Total absenteeism cost exceeds $1,000,000 – immediate management review recommended.
Data confidence is low – consider validating input data sources.
